page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 16 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and has a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware.

Benchmark data indicates a clear performance tradeoff between single-core and multi-core execution. Single-core performance is constrained, with stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the weak and poor categories respectively. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression benchmarks. Memory bandwidth remains average for both small and large block reads, though overall PassMark memory scores are weak.

Given its hardware profile and performance characteristics, the ecs.sn1.3xlarge is suited for multi-threaded workloads that can leverage its 16 dedicated cores without requiring high single-thread performance. Appropriate use cases include static web serving, multi-threaded data decompression, and moderate database operations. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a high density of dedicated physical cores relative to memory, making it a viable option for parallelized compute tasks where local storage is not required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.3xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance featuring 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz and 32.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps and contains no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU and memory performance are weak, whereas multi-core and multi-threaded capabilities achieve average tier results. This resource profile makes the instance qualitatively cost-efficient for parallelized, multi-threaded workloads that do not depend on high single-thread speeds or local disk storage. It is best suited for workloads such as static web serving, multi-threaded decompression, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.3xlarge is a KVM-based server with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps network bandwidth, offering average multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1.3xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 3 Gbps bandwidth, suited for multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 16-core compute instance offering balanced multi-threaded performance and 32 GB RAM for parallelized workloads without local storage.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY physical cores running at 2.5 GHz.
32.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core.
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor.
Average multi-core and multi-threaded benchmark performance.
No local storage or GPU accelerators included.
Best suited for static web serving and parallelized compute tasks.
